Manchester City making strong push to beat Arsenal to Jeremy Monga signing

Arsenal had made contact with Leicester over a deal for the 16-year-old winger last month.
nytimes.com
text:
🚨🔵 Manchester City are hijacking Arsenal deal to sign Jeremy Monga, negotiations are underway.

Enzo Maresca also involved to present project with Monga tempted.

#MCFC in active talks to get it done and anticipate Arsenal, as @SamiMokbel_BBC reports.
